title: Source Document frontmatter schema
description: Schema for SRC artifacts — passive reference documents (regulations, strategies, policies, standards, contracts) from which BRQ and CON are extracted. SRC is not a managed artifact: it has no lifecycle statuses, no ownership within the team, and does not participate in the obligation stack. It exists so that BRQ/CON can reference it via source_ref. Lives in 01-product/sources/ as a flat folder with category classification in frontmatter.

title.description: Human-readable title of the source document

category.description: Classification of the source document by origin type

version.description: Version or edition of the source document (e.g., '2016/679', 'v2.1', 'FY2026')

effective_date.description: Date when the document became effective (YYYY-MM-DD)

original_document.description: Path to the original file in 99-attachments/ (e.g., '99-attachments/gdpr-2016-679.pdf')

updated.description: Date of last update to this markdown file (YYYY-MM-DD)
